summary: Regression QA before staging — directory list+filter, VRT badge math, detail routing. All 11 requested checks passed on backend and frontend. Seed cleanup verified (count stayed at 188).
passed: GET /api/cars/stats -> {total:188, eligible:188, pending:0, by_category:{Performance / JDM:100, Everyday / Euro Classic:88}}
Every seeded car (188/188) returns is_eligible=true, status_label='👑 €200 FLAT VRT ELIGIBLE', countdown_display=null, time_left_days=0
Boundary FAR (+365d) -> is_eligible=false, status_label='⏳ COUNTDOWN ACTIVE', countdown_display='12 Months, 4 Days Remaining' (correct 'X Months, Y Days Remaining' format)
Boundary NEAR (+10d) -> is_eligible=false, countdown_display='9 Days Remaining' (correct 'X Day(s) Remaining' format; integer-day truncation from insertion-to-request latency caused 10→9, not a bug)
GET /api/cars/{valid_id} returns CarPublic with sentiment field embedded; GET /api/cars/does-not-exist returns 404
Frontend / loads, header sticky+visible, default tab Performance/JDM shows TOTAL=100 ELIGIBLE=100, switching to Everyday/Euro Classic shows 88/88
StatBar shows VEHICLES TRACKED 188 / VRT ELIGIBLE NOW 188 / COUNTDOWN ACTIVE 0
100 badge-eligible elements on JDM grid, 0 badge-active, 0 countdown-display elements
Click car card -> /car/{id} renders detail-car-name, detail-category, detail-badge-eligible, sentiment-section; detail-back-link returns to /
Deep link /car/{valid_id} renders detail page; /car/does-not-exist shows detail-error
Mobile 390x800: cars-grid is single column (grid width == card width 342px) and category-toggle-mobile visible
/auth/verify with no token renders 'MISSING TOKEN' gracefully (no crash, no uncaught console errors)

observations.note: Inserting a car at +10 days and immediately fetching returns '9 Days Remaining' due to timedelta.days integer truncation (seconds of elapsed time between insert and request). Format and logic are spec-compliant; only the exact integer day count drifts by 1 at the very edge. Not a blocker.
Two 404 console errors observed are the expected /api/cars/does-not-exist fetch from the bogus deep-link test itself. Directory load and valid detail load produce zero console errors.

mocked_apis: EMAIL_MODE=mock (intentional, not tested in this regression pass)
test_credentials: Not required for regression scope (auth/voting already verified in iteration_2)
